tasks.title: Project skeleton + makeBot() factory, config, and shared types
Persistence layer: schema + repositories (User, Cryptocurrency seed BTC/TON, UserAlert, PriceSnapshot)
CoinGecko price service: batched price + 24h change for BTC and TON
/start command: register user, welcome, coin-select inline keyboard
/setcrypto command: coin selection via arg or inline buttons, draft into session
/alerts and /removealert commands: list and disable a user's alerts
PriceMonitor loop: poll prices, snapshot, evaluate thresholds, dispatch alert DMs
